office_does: The commission sets utility policy and rates, oversees electric and water operations, and appoints the utility's chief executive.
race_blurb: The dossiers establish differing professional and public-service backgrounds, but do not support a mapping to an applicable rubric axis.

candidates.summary: King is a repeat candidate for the District 1 PUD seat; no detailed current platform was located.
highlights: Current and prior official election records verify his candidacy [S1][S2]

candidates.summary: St Clair is an Island County commissioner campaigning on utility affordability and reliability.
highlights: Prioritizes low rates and reliable energy [S2]
Participated in opening North Camano reliability infrastructure [S4]

candidates.summary: Logan is the incumbent commissioner and commission president with engineering, consulting, and school-district operations experience.
highlights: Has served on the utility commission since 2017 [S2][S3]
Official records establish utility-policy and executive-oversight responsibility [S2]
